title: MRMM-030 [Reprint Edition] Karen in Love, Saori Kawana
overview: The origin of all Karen girls, the first work of Max A and the former idol, Saori Kawana's love Karen, is now available in the popular complete remosaic series! It doesn't matter if you're new or beautiful! Keep messing around with licking! Please fully enjoy the rocket tits and ripe limbs that are familiar to Japanese people with full remosaic!
